FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.23sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fd936327320>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-06-01T21:46:50Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-01T21:44:46Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-06-01T21:46:50Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-01T21:44:46Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/06/01 21:48:27.341049386 {

2026/06/01 21:48:27.341072331 if (!missing(height))

2026/06/01 21:48:27.341115095 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/01 21:48:27.341123868 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/01 21:48:27.341129847 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/01 21:48:27.341130408 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/01 21:48:27.341144028 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/01 21:48:27.341144399 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/01 21:48:27.341150999 if (!missing(fg))

2026/06/01 21:48:27.341157759 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/01 21:48:27.341158109 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/01 21:48:27.341167894 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/06/01 21:48:27.341237619 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/01 21:48:27.341238049 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/01 21:48:27.341254484 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/01 21:48:27.341289557 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/06/01 21:48:27.341319181 "default"))
2026/06/01 21:48:27.341319732 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/01 21:48:27.341330849 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/01 21:48:27.341331410 }

2026/06/01 21:48:27.341355125 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/06/01 21:48:27.341366172 }

2026/06/01 21:48:27.341398801 }
2026/06/01 21:48:27.341408575 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/01 21:48:27.341409076 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]

2026/06/01 21:48:27.341433543 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)

2026/06/01 21:48:25.054761922 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054776023 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,

2026/06/01 21:48:25.054818887 {

2026/06/01 21:48:25.054836293 new <- list()
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054837055 if (!missing(width))
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054851240 new$width <- width
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054852823 if (!missing(height))
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054870089 new$height <- height

2026/06/01 21:48:25.054902017 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054902618 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054914085 new$version <- version
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054914606 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054924661 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054925211 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054940860 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054941682 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054953940 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054954491 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054964155 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054964696 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054975242 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054975773 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/01 21:48:25.054999498 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055000039 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055011737 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055012388 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055024025 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055024696 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055044856 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055045427 if (!missing(fillOddEven))

2026/06/01 21:48:25.055070044 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055070735 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055081902 if (!missing(timestamp))

2026/06/01 21:48:25.055094100 if (!missing(producer))
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055094711 new$producer <- producer
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055106719 if (!missing(author))
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055107240 new$author <- author
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055118036 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055118737 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055134060 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/06/01 21:48:25.055146599 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055161531 "default"))
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055162032 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055172217 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055172758 }
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055184055 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/06/01 21:48:25.055197335 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055197866 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055208392 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055208973 }
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055219398 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055219959 }
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055230144 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055230775 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]

2026/06/01 21:48:25.055242673 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055253895 domain = NA)
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055254926 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055267815 }
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055268366 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055278642 old$family <- family
2026/06/01 21:48:25.055279183 }

2026/06/01 21:48:25.055300515 "2.0")

2026/06/01 21:48:25.055356458 onefile <- old$onefile

2026/06/01 21:48:25.055419773 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,

2026/06/01 21:48:25.055432322 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],

2026/06/01 21:48:28.444339287 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
